basics.name: Youngjae Cho
basics.summary: AI/ML Researcher & Engineer with full-stack ML experience — from theoretical research to production serving. M.S. from KAIST, with publications at ICML and AAAI.

work.summary: Alternative military service. ML research and engineering.
highlights: Led first-author research on GAPO, a geometry-aware preference alignment method for LLMs (under review at ICML 2025)
Designed and implemented mantis-bench, a unified benchmarking CLI for model inference performance and pipeline stability
Built a protocol-based engine abstraction supporting vLLM, Hugging Face, and synthetic fallback for GPU-less CI testing
Implemented async load generation with metric aggregation and automated pass/fail gate reports

work.summary: Alternative military service. Full-stack ML engineering from research to production.
highlights: Developed data synthesis pipeline using diffusion models for industrial anomaly detection
Built OCR end-to-end pipeline for steel plate letter recognition with Triton inference
Optimized training and inference with Flash Attention, DeepSpeed, and TensorRT
Developed MLOps platform for data synthesis service

publications.name: Learning Where It Matters: Geometric Anchoring for Robust Preference Alignment
publications.summary: Proposed GAPO, a geometry-aware preference optimization framework that replaces fixed references with dynamic adversarial anchors for robust LLM alignment.

publications.name: Background-Aware Defect Generation for Robust Industrial Anomaly Detection
publications.summary: Proposed a diffusion-based defect synthesis method that disentangles background and defect context for controllable anomaly generation.

publications.name: Make Prompts Adaptable: Bayesian Modeling for Vision-Language Prompt Learning with Data-Dependent Prior
publications.summary: Introduced Bayesian priors with data-dependent context vectors for robust vision-language prompt learning.

publications.name: SAAL: Sharpness-Aware Active Learning
publications.summary: Proposed using maximally perturbed loss as an acquisition function for active learning, grounded in generalization theory.

publications.name: Improving Group-based Robustness and Calibration via Ordered Risk and Confidence Regularization
publications.publisher: ICML 2022 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance and Stability
publications.summary: Developed regularization techniques for improving robustness and calibration in group-based settings.

publications.name: Predict Sequential Credit Card Delinquency with VaDE-Seq2Seq
publications.summary: Applied variational deep embedding with Seq2Seq for sequential credit card delinquency prediction.

portfolio.name: GAPO: Geometric Anchor Preference Optimization (ICML 2025 submission)
portfolio.description: First-author research on geometry-aware robust preference alignment for LLMs using dynamic adversarial anchors.

portfolio.name: mantis-bench: Unified LLM Benchmarking CLI
portfolio.description: Designed and implemented a unified benchmarking package for model inference performance and pipeline stability with pluggable engine adapters and automated reporting.

portfolio.name: Data Synthesis for Industrial Anomaly Detection
portfolio.description: Developed a diffusion-based data synthesis pipeline for generating realistic industrial defect samples, achieving significant detection performance gains.

portfolio.name: OCR End-to-End Pipeline
portfolio.description: Built an end-to-end OCR pipeline for steel plate letter recognition with optimized Triton inference serving.

portfolio.name: Bayesian Prompt Learning (AAAI 2024)
portfolio.description: Research on Bayesian modeling for vision-language prompt learning with data-dependent priors.

portfolio.name: Sharpness-Aware Active Learning (ICML 2023)
portfolio.description: Research on sharpness-aware acquisition functions for active learning.
